titles.title: カイリューとゆうびんやさん

data.title: Kairyuu to Yuubinyasan
data.title_japanese: カイリューとゆうびんやさん
data.synopsis:
Hana, a young girl from the Paldea region who admires the postman Dragonite and aspires to become an ace mail carrier, one day receives a letter with no address. Determined to find the sender, she embarks on a frantic search alongside her partner, Hogator. After running around town, she finally tracks down the sender—a boy named Rio. Upon hearing his story, Hana learns that Rio wrote the letter to celebrate his father's birthday, who is stationed alone in the Kanto region. However, the day of his father's birthday has already arrived...

(Source: Official YouTube, translated)

data.title: Nmeneko
data.synopsis:
Follows the funny and amusing daily lives of two cats who want to live life doing only fun things.

(Source: ANN)

titles.title: Mezametara Saikyou Soubi to Uchuusenmochi Datta node, Ikkodate Mezashite Youhei toshite Jiyuu ni Ikitai
Reborn as a Space Mercenary: I Woke Up Piloting the Strongest Starship!
目覚めたら最強装備と宇宙船持ちだったので、一戸建て目指して傭兵として自由に生きたい

data.title: Mezametara Saikyou Soubi to Uchuusenmochi Datta node, Ikkodate Mezashite Youhei toshite Jiyuu ni Ikitai
data.title_japanese: 目覚めたら最強装備と宇宙船持ちだったので、一戸建て目指して傭兵として自由に生きたい
title_synonyms: Reborn as a Space Mercenary: I Woke Up Piloting the Strongest Starship!
data.synopsis:
Sato Takahiro was an ordinary office worker and hobbyist gamer until the day he woke up on a spaceship–one that strangely resembled a craft from a favorite space-shooter game. With a decked-out ship, a crew full of babes, and a fantastic universe to explore, he's going to make the most of his good luck and create the life he's always dreamed of!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titles.title: The Stunned Hero and the Assassin Princesses
The Shy Hero and the Assassin Princesses

data.title: Kizetsu Yuusha to Ansatsu Hime
data.title_english: The Shy Hero and the Assassin Princesses
title_synonyms: The Stunned Hero and the Assassin Princesses
data.synopsis:
Toto has been dreaming about adventuring with other people for as long as he can remember. Despite his hero title, he still remains without allies due to his timid personality. Therefore, when three women: Ciel, Anemone, and Goa suddenly request to join him, Toto is overjoyed. Unbeknownst to him, they are all assassins assigned to eliminate him!

While Toto resolves to protect his would-be killers, the women fight over who can finish off the hero. As Toto remains oblivious of his new party members' true intentions and finds himself passing out every time he gets flustered, the four of them embark on their peculiar adventure into the greater world.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Chapon no Hero!
それいけ！アンパンマン チャポンのヒーロー！

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Chapon no Hero!
data.title_japanese: それいけ！アンパンマン チャポンのヒーロー！
data.synopsis:
Centers on Chapon, a mysterious boy who falls from the sky without any knowledge of where he came from. Staying with Anpanman, he one day helps someone out and gets to know the joy of making someone smile, and dreams of becoming a hero like Anpanman. But when Baikinman arrives, and reveals the secret of Chapon's origins, Chapon must figure out if his origins or his dreams define who he is.

(Source: ANN)

titles.title: A Star Brighter Than the Sun

data.title: Taiyou yori mo Mabushii Hoshi
data.title_english: A Star Brighter Than the Sun
data.synopsis:
Sae Iwata was never cute or dainty like the other girls, and due to her build and strength, she always felt the need to look after her delicate childhood friend and crush, Kouki Kamishiro. But as years passed, Kouki grew taller and more confident, which resulted in them drifting apart.

Toward the end of middle school, Sae reconnects with Kouki. Seeing that Kouki is still the sweet boy she once knew, she realizes that her dormant feelings for him have resurfaced. She tries her best to suppress her emotions—but it becomes even more difficult as, come high school, they end up in the same class. Ignoring her deepening feelings may seem like a fool's errand, but this boy that shines brighter than the sun may just prove to be her destiny.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.synopsis:
The first animation I made in 1983 was an 8mm film with a triangle as the main focus. 40 years have passed since then. What can we do by going back to the basics in this digital age?

(Source: Into Animation 8)

data.title: Secret Jouju: Byeol-ui Boseog
data.synopsis:
Jouju is tasked with finding the hidden Joubijou, balancing good and evil in the celestial world with her dear friends Cindy, Stella, and the mysterious 'Rosa'. While getting back Joubijou from Lucy 'the treasure hunter', Jouju protects her family and friends from witches and navigates through a magical journey in order to become a true guardian of stars.

(Source: Prime Video)

data.title: Kuro Gal à la Carte
data.synopsis:
Rina, a gyaru girl, has a very peculiar relationship with Zen, her childhood friend. She forces him to dress as a bear, just like they did when they were kids. However, their game recently took a more intimate turn.

Everything changes when Zen decides to put an end to their arrangement and tells her he no longer wants to continue with that kind of relationship. Desperate, Rina confesses her true feelings of love for him. This moment marks the beginning of a passionate life together.
